features.title: Real-Time Face Swapping
features.description: Replace detected faces in live webcam feed using ONNX inswapper_128_fp16 model
acceptance_criteria: Real-time preview at 30-60 FPS on target GPU
features.notes: Core feature; continuously optimized across all versions

features.title: Face Detection & Analysis
features.description: Detect and analyze faces using InsightFace buffalo_l model with embedding extraction
acceptance_criteria: Face embedding extraction for similarity matching
features.notes: Optimized in Feb 2026 for Apple Silicon performance

features.title: Face Enhancement (GFPGAN)
features.description: Optional face restoration/enhancement post-swap using GFPGAN v1.4
acceptance_criteria: Conditional device support (CUDA, CoreML/MPS on macOS ARM)
Toggleable via UI checkbox and --frame-processor CLI flag

features.title: Mouth Masking
features.description: Preserve original mouth region to maintain natural speech lip-sync
acceptance_criteria: Mouth region detected from face landmarks
Poisson blending for smooth mask boundaries
Toggleable via --mouth-mask CLI flag and UI
features.notes: Improved with Poisson blending in v2.0.2c (Dec 2025)

features.title: Face Mapping (Multi-Person Swap)
features.description: Map different source faces to specific subjects in a multi-person scene
acceptance_criteria: Drag-and-drop UI for source-target face matching
K-means clustering for centroid-based face matching
Embedding storage for live mode persistence
Support for 2+ source faces per scene
features.notes: Fixed live-mode face count mismatch (>maps available) in PR #572

features.title: Live Webcam Streaming
features.description: Real-time webcam preview with face swap applied
acceptance_criteria: 30-60 FPS preview at target GPU spec
Clean stop when preview window is closed
features.notes: Mirror + resizable options added; live-stop-on-close fixed (PR #321)

features.title: Batch Video Processing
features.description: CLI headless mode to process saved video files with face swap output
acceptance_criteria: Headless CLI: run.py -s source.jpg -t input.mp4 -o output.mp4
features.notes: Supports multiple video codecs; ThreadPoolExecutor batch size configurable

features.title: GPU Acceleration
features.description: Platform-specific GPU optimization via ONNX Runtime provider selection
acceptance_criteria: NVIDIA CUDA (onnxruntime-gpu) default on non-Apple machines
CPU fallback when no GPU available
GPU-accelerated OpenCV ops on compatible hardware
features.notes: GPU-accelerated OpenCV added v2.0.3c (Feb 2026). TensorRT Apr 2025.

features.title: NSFW Content Filtering
features.description: Optional OpenNSFW2-based frame filtering to prevent processing inappropriate content
acceptance_criteria: Frame skipped (not processed) when NSFW detected
Off by default; enabled via --nsfw-filter flag
features.notes: Re-enabled Aug 2024 after initial false-positive issues; off by default

features.title: Internationalization (i18n)
features.description: Multi-language UI support with locale JSON files
acceptance_criteria: 8 supported languages (Indonesian, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Russian, German, Spanish, French)
Fallback to English when translation missing
